title: 7 Cues to Know if Someone Likes You
text: I have a fun question for you do you think someone likes you in this video I want to talk about some of the cues to know if you think someone likes you has a crush on you is maybe attracted to you there are certain things that humans do over and over again when they feel attraction so you should be on the lookout for these cues number one mirroring mirroring is when we subtly copy or mimic someone's gestures voice tone even word usage and research has found that when we like someone even on a friendship level we tend to mimic mirror or copy them we even do this without realizing it like our heart rates can sync up with our best friend we tend to mimic or copy the vocal tone of someone we like in the room or even the most powerful person in the room so pay attention to see are they sitting like you do they sound like you are you they using the words that you're using are they using the amount of gestures you're using a kind of easy way to see this is are they sitting the way that you're sitting and if you change your seated position do they copy it within a minute or two that's a good indicator that someone is mirroring ing you because they want to show you I'm so in tune with you I literally want to sit sound and act like you without even realizing it attraction cue number two understanding space so researcher Edward Hall looked at the space between individuals the fancy word for this is proxemics and what he found is that there are four basic zones there's the public Zone depending on your culture this can be anywhere around 7 feet away so two people about 7 feet away from each other next is the social Zone this is the Zone we like to socialize in depending your culture this is 3 to 5 ft away and there's the personal Zone the personal Zone means we're starting to really get intimate but we're not pre physical touch yet but we want to be even closer the personal zone is a foot and a half to three feet away again depending on your culture and the last Zone reserved for the most intimate of people is called the intimate Zone that is literally preissing or pre-touch and it is about a foot and a half or 18 inches to zero inches away what you want
